texto: My dad is just like everybody else's dad. I see him as kind of a goofy guy with a great sense of humor. I try to get in a battle of wits with him, but he always gets me. I emulate him because I've never seen anyone work as hard as he does.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Peter Uihlein: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “My dad is just like everybody else's dad. I see him as kind of a goofy guy with a great sense of …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, work, great pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e great.

frase_original: My dad is just like everybody else's dad. I see him as kind of a goofy guy with a great sense of humor. I try to get in a battle of wits with him, but he always gets me. I emulate him because I've never seen anyone work as hard as he does.
